description: NewsIndiaIndia NewsAdvertisementIndia NewsUP was in fear earlier, now only development: PM Modi slams past governmentsThe Prime Minister also took a sharp jibe at the Congress and the Samajwadi Party for allegedly spewing venomous politics in the state as well as in the country.India NewsCase against seer Avimukteshwaranand on charges of sexual assault on minor disciplesThe seer has denied the charges, termed the case a conspiracy, and sought a high-level probe. Mukundanand Brahmachari also rejected the allegations as baseless, while Ayodhya priest Mahant Raju Das called for a fair and impartial investigation.India NewsVideo: PM Modi flags off Meerut metro, entire Namo Bharat corridorThe Prime Minister was received by he UP Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath Adityanath at the Hindon Airport in Ghaziabad, from where the two proceeded to Meerut to flag off the train. He was also briefed about the functioning of the metro.01:20India NewsAir India cancels New York, Newark flights on Monday due to severe winter stormMeteorologists warned that the strongest impacts are likely along coastal zones, where heavy snow, high winds and storm surge conditions may combine to create hazardous conditions through early Monday.advertisementKarnataka NewsEven officials take bribes: Siddaramaiah flags 'transfer agent' menace in KarnatakaSiddaramaiah warned government employees against approaching 'transfer agents', saying postings are being done through a transparent counselling system to curb corruption.India NewsOne incident of slapping wife over stay at parental home not cruelty: High CourtThe prosecution case primarily centred around frequent quarrels between the couple. Evidence indicated that the husband would perform "banjo" at marriage ceremonies during night hours to earn additional income and return home late. The wife reportedly disliked his late-night performances, and disputes would arise following his return.Tamil Nadu NewsTamil Nadu law & order in shambles: BJP tears into MK Stalin after terror arrestsSix terror suspects were arrested from Tamil Nadu's Tiruppur on Sunday. The BJP launched a scathing attack on Chief Minister M K Stalin, alleging that the state has become a breeding ground for terrorism under the DMK's rule.India NewsTerrorist killed in J&K's Kishtwar gunbattle, top Jaish commander trappedA terrorist was killed in a gunbattle with security forces in Jammu and Kashmir's Kishtwar. During the operation, a top Jaish-e-Mohammed (JeM) commander was trapped.advertisementIndia NewsWatch: Delhi-Meerut Namo Bharat train's premium coach and its featuresThe features include an emergency healthcare alarm and charging points on the side of each seat. In addition to this, the coach has blinders to protect the passengers from scorching sunlight.01:37India News3 killed, many injured in UP after private bus collides with roadways bus head-onChief Minister Yogi Adityanath ordered the officials to ensure the best possible treatment for the injured and also expressed his grief over the incident.KNOW YOUR LAWSDivorce, disputes and dogs: Why pet custody is emerging as a legal grey areaWhile courts currently treat pets as property, lawyers say disputes over "furbabies" are rising, prompting increased reliance on mediation agreements covering care, expenses and visitation.India News2 sisters, set to get married on same day, die by suicide in JodhpurA relative has alleged family pressure behind the incident, while police have registered a case of unnatural death and launched an investigation.advertisementIndia NewsCaught on CCTV: Truck hits biker, throws him into roadside pit in MaharashtraResidents alleged lack of barricading and warning signs at the digging site, raising concerns over civic negligence and road safety.India NewsSharad Pawar admitted to Pune hospital again as health deterioratesThe veteran NCP-SP leader has a cough and throat infection, his daughter and MP Supriya Sule has confirmed.India NewsPM inaugurates India's fastest metro in Meerut, entire Namo Bharat corridorPrime Minister Narendra Modi today launched the remaining portions of the Delhi-Meerut Namo Bharat corridor and the Meerut Metro, India's fastest metro service. The journey on the 82-km RRTS corridor will take just under an hour.India News5 police personnel killed, 3 critical as speeding trailer rams Bolero in OdishaThe injured personnel are undergoing treatment at the district headquarters hospital. Police have detained the trailer driver and launched an investigation into the accident.India NewsDelhi Police bust Lashkar-linked terror module; 8 arrested from Tamil Nadu, BengalThe terror module has links to Pakistan's ISI and Bangladesh-based extremist groups and was allegedly planning a major attack in India, police said.India NewsAll pain, no gain: Congress slams India-US trade deal amid Trump's tariffs chaosCongress leader Pawan Khera criticised the India-US interim trade deal, alleging it has left India with an effective tariff burden of 18.4% despite being projected as a diplomatic success by the Centre.India NewsVideo: Punjabi NRI woman pulls out sword to scare off robbers in dramatic clashHarjind Kaur took out a sword as she stepped out of the vehicle and stood her ground, daring the robbers to step forward. The video of her bravery has gone viral.India NewsTwo CRPF jawans hurt in IED blasts during anti-Maoist ops in JharkhandWest Singhbhum Superintendent of Police Amit Renu confirmed the incident, stating that the blast occurred during an ongoing anti-Naxal operation. Following the explosion, security forces intensified combing operations in the area and heightened vigil to prevent further attacks.Load MoreAdvertisementAlso WatchUnPolitics: Milind Deora on Congress exit, Mahayuti role, 2029 South Mumbai bidPost-Mortem: Disturbing crimes rooted in obsession, emotional turmoil shock IndiaHealth 360: India's rare disease patients struggle while Rs 271 crore funds unspentAdvertisementLatest StoriesUP was in fear earlier, now only development: PM Modi slams past governmentsCase against seer Avimukteshwaranand on charges of sexual assault on minor disciplesAfter Vini Jr., Fofana, Hannibal receive racial abuse after Chelsea-Burnley drawAdvertisement
